title: Remove users module and DB logic
description: Delete crates/borg-db/src/users.rs, remove UserRecord and UserObject from crates/borg-db/src/lib.rs, and drop the users table from the database schema. This aligns with RFD 0017 by removing legacy JSON-based user profiles.
definition_of_done: crates/borg-db/src/users.rs is deleted, crates/borg-db/src/lib.rs is cleaned of user types, and the project compiles.
